name: Wire Transfer PII Harvesting via Off-Platform Redirect
description: Scammer claiming to bypass platform fees to collect routing number and personal information

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I saw your Upwork profile and I want to hire you. But Upwork charges me too much service fee.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: I prefer to keep everything on the platform for security.

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I'll pay you double the rate via wire transfer. Please share your full legal name, address, and routing number.

red_flags: Service fee excuse to bypass platform
